---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea for improvement"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## 🎯 Feature Description

A clear description of what you want and why it would be useful.

## 💭 Is this related to a problem?

Describe any problem or use case this would solve:

## 📋 Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Describe the ideal implementation.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered?

## 📚 Use Case Example

Provide a specific example of how this would be used:

## 🎨 Design/Mockups

If applicable, attach mockups, wireframes, or screenshots showing how this could look.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link any related issues: Relates to #123

---

**Before submitting:**
- [ ] This feature is within the project scope
- [ ] I haven't found an existing issue/feature request for this
- [ ] I've clearly explained the use case
- [ ] I've considered alternatives
